title: Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh, with a Z-Score of +5.11. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kūt-e ‘Abdollāh is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 16.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 15%, and the wind speed is 5.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the heat wave is expected to persist.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the population and infrastructure.
